title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0084 37 Sandholme Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 3RP
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  T McGreene, TMCGI Ltd  Site address:  37 Sandholme Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 3RP  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of existing rear extension and erection of a single storey rear extension; alterations to roof including construction of a rear dormer and change of use of property from single dwelling to two flats.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 24 February 2025   Date by when representations must be made 1 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 22 April 2025   Decision date 20 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 196 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 1 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0084 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     1 37SandholmeRd Location Plan 2  (PDF, 306 KB, 1 page)  201-Existing Proposed Site Plan v03  (PDF, 335 KB, 1 page)  3 37SandholmeRd Existing Floor Plan  (PDF, 247 KB, 1 page)  302-Proposed Floor Plans v03  (PDF, 355 KB, 1 page)  3M-409 - Plannning Statement - 37 Sandholme Rd  (PDF, 144 KB, 12 pages)  3MP - BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 612 KB, 3 pages)  402-Proposed Elevations v03  (PDF, 290 KB, 1 page)  5 37SandholmeRd Existing Elevations  (PDF, 1.16 MB, 1 page)  502-Proposed Sections v03  (PDF, 232 KB, 1 page)  7 37SandholmeRd Existing Sections  (PDF, 303 KB, 1 page)  9 37SandholmeRd Volume Allowance  (PDF, 561 KB,...
